title: Totem and Shield Switcher
description: Easily switch between your Totem and Shield without having to open your Inventory!
body:
# 🛡️ Totem and Shield Switcher Mod

Easily switch between your Totem and shield in your offhand.

### Features

- **Easy Switching**: No need to open your inventory to switch between a totem and a shield. Just press a button!
- **Customizable Keybind**: Choose the button you want to use for switching items in the minecraft keybind settings.
# Make sure to check out my other mod too!

[🗿 Small Totem Pop Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/cpvp)
